name: rock room
hints: A rock room containing alien machinery! This is deep in the underground complex.
Examine the alien machinery carefully. It may be operational or contain useful components.
The machinery relates to the alien technology throughout the complex. Interact with it to learn its purpose.
N=dimly lit rock room (23). The alien machinery is part of the endgame puzzle sequence.
notes: Rock room with alien machinery. N=dimly lit rock room (23). Machinery is part of endgame puzzle.
